human_reason: Tower Security Inbox collects important security events into one owner review queue without exposing secrets.
readiness_label: Tower Security Inbox owner queue ready

recent_items.human_reason: Raw secret value was rejected. The Tower may only store a reference.
Security Command owner UI block is healthy: preferred destination, unified page, quick actions, visibility, coverage, and checkpoints are all passing.

soulaana_translation: Soulaana: The Tower has an inbox now. Suspicious, important, and owner-review events have somewhere to land.
